title: NHKマイルCの後に・芝でも砂でも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The NHK Mile Cup draws to a close. Taiki Shuttle
is overjoyed, having brought happiness to so
many people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is where all the ace Umamusume
gather—the Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enter the Unicorn Stakes in the
meantime—the perfect race to gain some
much-needed experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Preparing for the big stage ahead, Taiki Shuttle
tackles the dirt track head-on.
